title: Vietnamese Beef Banh Cuon
description: A traditional Vietnamese dish made with beef, rice noodles, and herbs, wrapped in a thin rice sheet.

ingredients.name: creamy sauce
ingredients.notes: made from mayonnaise and soy sauce

ingredients.name: bitter leaves
ingredients.notes: such as kale or collard greens

instructions: Soak the rice noodles in warm water for 10 minutes, then drain and set aside.
Slice the beef into thin strips and season with salt, pepper, and cilantro.
Prepare the creamy sauce by mixing together mayonnaise and soy sauce.
Assemble the banh cuon by placing a small amount of beef and herbs on a banh cuon wrapper, followed by a slice of noodles.
Roll the wrapper tightly and secure with a toothpick.
Serve the banh cuon with creamy sauce and garnish with green onions and cilantro.
